name: SugarCRMConnector
description: Connects to SugarCRM (REST API v11) to read, search, create, update, and delete Contacts, Accounts, Opportunities, Leads, and Meetings via OAuth2. Supports both the password grant (on-prem) and the authorization-code grant (SugarCloud).

install_fields.label: SugarCRM Site URL
install_fields.help: e.g. https://yourcompany.sugarondemand.com — the root URL of your SugarCRM deployment. The connector appends /rest/v11 automatically.

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Client ID
install_fields.help: OAuth2 client ID. Defaults to 'sugar' (SugarCRM's built-in trusted client for the password grant).

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Client Secret
install_fields.placeholder: Leave blank for the default 'sugar' client
install_fields.help: OAuth2 client secret. Leave blank when using the default 'sugar' client; required for custom OAuth applications.

install_fields.label: SugarCRM Username
install_fields.help: Required when grant_type=password. Use a SugarCRM service account with the minimum scopes you intend to expose.

install_fields.label: SugarCRM Password
install_fields.help: Required when grant_type=password. Stored encrypted by Shielva.

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Grant Type
install_fields.help: 'password' for on-prem deployments, 'authorization_code' for SugarCloud / SugarCRM OAuth applications.

install_fields.label: Platform Identifier
install_fields.help: SugarCRM 'platform' string sent with every token request. Use 'api' for service-account integrations.

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Redirect URI
install_fields.help: Required only when grant_type=authorization_code. Must match the redirect URI registered on the SugarCRM OAuth client exactly.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum SugarCRM API requests per minute. Default 60 is conservative; raise to match your SugarCRM license tier.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates configuration and runs the OAuth2 token exchange. For grant_type=password the install completes the exchange immediately; for grant_type=authorization_code it only validates fields and waits for authorize().

apis.name: Authorize (OAuth Code Exchange)
apis.description: Exchanges an OAuth2 authorization code for access and refresh tokens. Used only when grant_type=authorization_code.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies SugarCRM API connectivity by calling GET /me with the current access token.

apis.name: List Contacts
apis.description: List contacts with offset/max_num pagination and an optional SugarCRM filter envelope.

apis.name: Get Contact
apis.description: Fetch a single contact by ID.

apis.name: Create Contact
apis.description: Create a new contact. Email is rendered as the SugarCRM email array (primary_address=true).

apis.name: Update Contact
apis.description: Update arbitrary fields on an existing contact via PUT /Contacts/{id}.

apis.name: List Accounts
apis.description: List customer accounts with offset/max_num pagination.

apis.name: List Opportunities
apis.description: List sales opportunities with offset/max_num pagination.

apis.name: Create Opportunity
apis.description: Create a new opportunity. When date_closed is omitted it defaults to 30 days from today to satisfy the SugarCRM required-field constraint.

apis.name: Convert Lead
apis.description: Convert a lead into Contact/Account/Opportunity records. 'modules' follows the SugarCRM convert payload shape (Contacts/Accounts/Opportunities keys with per-module field dicts).

apis.name: List Meetings
apis.description: List calendar meetings with offset/max_num pagination.
